commands.name: Docker PS
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "docker ps"'
commands.description: List all currently running Docker containers

commands.name: Docker Stop All Containers
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "docker stop $(docker ps -q)"'
commands.description: Stop all running Docker containers at once

commands.name: Docker Prune Images
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "docker image prune -f"'
commands.description: Remove all dangling (unused) Docker images to free up disk space

commands.name: Docker Prune All
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "docker system prune -af"'
commands.description: Remove all stopped containers, unused networks, images, and build cache

commands.name: Docker Compose Up
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "docker compose up -d"'
commands.description: Start all services defined in docker-compose.yml in detached mode

commands.name: Docker Compose Down
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "docker compose down"'
commands.description: Stop and remove all containers defined in docker-compose.yml
